span.p:
Flask App (Python 3.13)
— app.py entry point
— CORS enabled
— JWT Authentication
— Port 5000

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 46) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MongoDB 8
— ECIRAS database
— Collections: users, messages,
referenced_articles
— Port 27017

div.style: color: rgb(26, 26, 46) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Ollama
— qwen3:8b model (default)
— REST /chat API
— Port 11434
